answer: Pumble is a team messaging and collaboration platform developed by CAKE.com [1]. It offers a free tier that includes unlimited users, unlimited message history, and 10 GB of total workspace storage [2][1]. While the platform provides open API access for developers, integrating third-party apps is restricted based on your plan [1]. The free tier is limited to specific native integrations, such as Clockify and Plaky [2][3]. To access a higher number of app integrations or unlimited integration options, you must upgrade to a paid Pro or Business plan [3][4].
